chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: In today's video we will learn how to use audio, video and media elements in html

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: In our very first video we saw that we can embed videos in html

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Today I will tell you how to play the video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: How to keep the video muted

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And how to enable and disable the video controls

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Along with that we will see about audio closely

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: How to show media in an overall page

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So do like this video and stay tuned

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Because the examples I have used for video tags are very interesting

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and roll the intro

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Friends, this time I have made a folder named video10

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And I will not waste your time by opening the code and clicking shift right

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Infact I will make it in index.html

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And the topic of today's video is video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: How to play video in an html file

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: How to insert video, audio and media

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So adding video is very straightforward

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will copy this video tag which has an src attribute

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And there are some other attributes of this tag

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Which I will discuss with you guys

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But first of all I want to tell you that

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Video src is equal to video.mp4

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So if you have video.mp4 then it will play

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So let's see I have added video.mp4

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And I will preview it by clicking here

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And you can see that the video is ready

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now this is a very big video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I can give its width

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I can say that width is equal to 555 pixels

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And as soon as I do 555 pixels

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Infact I don't need to write px

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will just do 555

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: As soon as we don't need to write px in image

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: We don't need to write px here as well

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So as soon as I do width equal to 555

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will do a thing

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will do height equal to 555

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So that it becomes smaller

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Infact I will make it smaller

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will do 255

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And you can see it is here

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now I will play it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Because I have control over it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I can play it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Look here, there is a good road from America

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What's your name?

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Kupendra Jogi

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Where have you been in the US?

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I have been to many places in the US

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What's your name?

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Kupendra Jogi

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So you can play video like this

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now there are some attributes of video tag

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It is very easy to use video tag

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You should have a video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You have to give a path of video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: After that you have to select control

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So you will get controls

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can download it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can full screen it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can mute it

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can do picture in picture

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: All this is provided by your browser

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But let me tell you about some attributes

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: First attribute is src

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So you must be knowing

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Put the video here

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: The name of the video file is src

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This video file can also come from external url

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If I have uploaded a video on Amazon s3

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I can also put the url there

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It is not necessary that the video file

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: can be on your computer or server

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It can also come from third party

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now what are the controls?

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Adds video controls

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Like play, pause and volume

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Which we have seen in the video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: That you are getting controls here

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now the browser automatically sees

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What will be the control and what will not be in your video

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then it will automatically play

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: As soon as the page is loaded

chunks.title: Audio Media in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So if I press auto play

text: In today's video we will learn how to use audio, video and media elements in html In our very first video we saw that we can embed videos in html Today I will tell you how to play the video How to keep the video muted And how to enable and disable the video controls Along with that we will see about audio closely How to show media in an overall page So do like this video and stay tuned Because the examples I have used for video tags are very interesting Let's go to the computer screen and roll the intro Friends, this time I have made a folder named video10 And I will not waste your time by opening the code and clicking shift right Infact I will make it in index.html And the topic of today's video is video How to play video in an html file How to insert video, audio and media So adding video is very straightforward I will copy this video tag which has an src attribute And there are some other attributes of this tag Which I will discuss with you guys But first of all I want to tell you that Video src is equal to video.mp4 So if you have video.mp4 then it will play So let's see I have added video.mp4 And I will preview it by clicking here And you can see that the video is ready Now this is a very big video So I can give its width So I can say that width is equal to 555 pixels And as soon as I do 555 pixels Infact I don't need to write px I will just do 555 As soon as we don't need to write px in image We don't need to write px here as well So as soon as I do width equal to 555 I will do a thing I will do height equal to 555 So that it becomes smaller Infact I will make it smaller I will do 255 And you can see it is here Now I will play it Because I have control over it I can play it Look here, there is a good road from America What's your name? Kupendra Jogi Where have you been in the US? I have been to many places in the US What's your name? Kupendra Jogi So you can play video like this Now there are some attributes of video tag It is very easy to use video tag You should have a video You have to give a path of video After that you have to select control So you will get controls You can download it You can full screen it You can mute it You can do picture in picture All this is provided by your browser But let me tell you about some attributes First attribute is src So you must be knowing Put the video here The name of the video file is src This video file can also come from external url If I have uploaded a video on Amazon s3 I can also put the url there It is not necessary that the video file can be on your computer or server It can also come from third party Now what are the controls? Adds video controls Like play, pause and volume Which we have seen in the video That you are getting controls here Now the browser automatically sees What will be the control and what will not be in your video Then it will automatically play As soon as the page is loaded So if I press auto play
